title: Herobrine Awakens
description: You can run, but you can’t hide!
body:
Summon the legend. Face the nightmare. In this terrifying mod, Herobrine has returned, more relentless than ever. Once the command **/start** is used, Herobrine is unleashed into your world, watching… waiting… hunting.
- Tracks Players from up to 200 blocks away
- Chases You to the Death—once provoked, there’s no escape.
- Never Despawns—you can run, but you can’t hide.
- True Horror Experience—prepare for eerie encounters, unexplained events, and pure terror.


_**"This mod was created at the request of a friend! If you want your own custom mod, join my Discord to make a request!"**_

[https://discord.gg/HA34d8fn](https://discord.gg/HA34d8fn)
